name: pi-logo
readme: # pi-logo A `Pi` extension to show a new `Pi` logo every time you open `Pi.` ## Install ```bash pi install npm:pi-logo ``` Restart Pi. ## What you get - Random Pi logo on startup - Small animation when Pi opens a new session - Built-in shortcut help in the header - Responsive layout for narrow terminals ## How to use? Just open Pi! and enjoy a new logo everytime you open `Pi.` ## Try without installing ```bash pi -e npm:pi-logo ``` ## Remove ```bash pi remove npm:pi-logo ``` --- ```asm █▀█ pi-logo v1.0.0 █▀ █ Oh by the way, which one’s Pink? ```
